title: Trident Buffs
description: A Data Pack which improves Tridents in a multitude of ways, such as a new throw effect and enchant!
body:
# TRIDENT BUFFS
This is a datapack which improves tridents in various ways!\
They are stronger and more fun to use as an actual weapon, both thrown and melee.

## Changes
**General**:
- Increased Durability to 750
- Increased throw velocity by 25%
- Thrown Tridents can ONLY be picked up by their owner
- Thrown Tridents create a damaging splash when landing in a block, which deals 6 Drowning damage to enemies near it
  - Can change the Splash Damage Value with:
    - `/scoreboard players set #trident_buffs aolu_tb_splash_damage x` with x being the new value.
    - Default is 6
  - Splash damage does not hurt the Trident's Throwers or their Pets
  - Damage ownership is from who/what threw the Trident

**Enchantments**:
- **Impaling**: Instead adds 0.8 Damage per Level against ALL entities
- **Loyalty**: Trident returns MUCH faster
- **Channeling**: In addition to its normal effects, it also grants Resistance to Lightning Damage when the Trident is held.
  Hits apply a custom debuff called **Static**
  - **Static** will cause the target to be struck by lightning 4 seconds later
  - Further hits will reduce the timer by 1.5 seconds
  - Tridents will also apply **static** to themselves when landing, but will get removed if it enters the air again
- **[NEW] Aqua Orb**: When a trident lands in a block, it spawns a turret above it which shoots water orbs at enemies near it.
  - The orb will not target the thrower or their pets
  - The orb has 20HP and can be killed before it expires
  - It can be powered up with lightning to improve its duration, range and fire rate
  - **Cannot** be combined with **Loyalty** or **Riptide**
  - It is about as common as **Channeling**
